title: CCL - Close/reopen the app
scenario: CCL (Call Control Level) setting does not persist after closing and reopening the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app with a connected device that supports Call Control Level (CCL).
2. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected [Device Name].
4. Locate the Call Control Level (CCL) setting and select a value (e.g., High, Medium, Low, or Off).
5. Fully close the Poly Studio Mobile app (swipe it away from the recent apps list).
6. Reopen the Poly Studio Mobile app.
7. Navigate back to Device Settings → Advanced for the same device.
expected: The previously selected CCL setting value is still displayed and selected in the Advanced settings.
